category_title: Middle school students with traumatic brain injury who make disrespectful comments and lack materials
scenario_title: Independent work on difficult tasks with peers present
minimal_context: Zeke is assigned a difficult independent math worksheet to complete while sitting near his peers in the special education classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on the independent math worksheet on your desk. You have 10 minutes to complete these problems.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't even have a pencil.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is a pencil. Go ahead and start.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes the pencil and starts drawing on the back of the worksheet) This is stupid anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to work on the math problems.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns away from the worksheet to a peer sitting nearby) What are you looking at? Keep staring and I'll punch you in the face.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working on the independent math worksheet on your desk. You have 10 minutes to complete these problems.

STUDENT: I don't even have a pencil.

TUTOR: Here is a pencil. Go ahead and start.

STUDENT: (Takes the pencil and starts drawing on the back of the worksheet) This is stupid anyway.

TUTOR: You need to work on the math problems.

STUDENT: (Turns away from the worksheet to a peer sitting nearby) What are you looking at? Keep staring and I'll punch you in the face.
